CustomField.formula: IF( RecordType.DeveloperName == "Business_Entity", "BE-" & AccountNumberAuto__c, IF( RecordType.DeveloperName == "Facility" || RecordType.DeveloperName == "DrinkingWaterSystem" || RecordType.DeveloperName == "DrinkingWaterSourceIntake", "FA-" & AccountNumberAuto__c, "" ) )
CustomField.label: Account Number
